# Scopy AI

> Scopy AI is an open-source AI code reviewer. Self-host it or use hosted Scopy AI to catch bugs, enforce review rules and improve code quality. Pages on this site are also available as Markdown via content negotiation (Accept: text/markdown).

## Main

- [Homepage](https://scopy.dev/): What Scopy AI does, how reviews work, pricing and FAQ
- [Blog](https://scopy.dev/blog): Articles on AI code review, self-hosting and review practices
- [Terms & Privacy](https://scopy.dev/privacy): Terms of Service and Privacy Policy for the hosted service

## Blog posts

- [What Is AI Code Review? A Practical Guide](https://scopy.dev/blog/what-is-ai-code-review)
- [Code Review Best Practices for Fast-Moving Teams](https://scopy.dev/blog/code-review-best-practices)
- [Self-Hosted AI Code Review on Your Own Infrastructure](https://scopy.dev/blog/self-hosted-ai-code-review)
- [Self-Hosted vs Cloud AI Code Review: How to Choose](https://scopy.dev/blog/self-hosted-vs-cloud-ai-code-review)
- [AI Code Review vs Static Analysis: What Each One Catches](https://scopy.dev/blog/ai-code-review-vs-static-analysis)
- [Pull Request Description Template for Better Code Reviews](https://scopy.dev/blog/pull-request-description-template)
- [How to Write Natural-Language Code Review Rules](https://scopy.dev/blog/natural-language-code-review-rules)
- [Why Diff-Only Code Review Misses Bugs](https://scopy.dev/blog/why-diff-only-code-review-misses-bugs)
- [Reviewing AI-Generated Code: A Practical Checklist](https://scopy.dev/blog/code-review-checklist-ai-generated-code)
- [Open-Source AI Code Review Tools in 2026: An Honest Comparison](https://scopy.dev/blog/open-source-ai-code-review-tools)
- [Why AI Code Reviewers Are So Noisy (and How to Fix It)](https://scopy.dev/blog/ai-code-review-false-positives)
- [Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternatives (2026)](https://scopy.dev/blog/coderabbit-open-source-alternatives)

## Documentation

- [Scopy AI Docs](https://docs.scopy.dev/): Product guide, quickstart and self-hosting documentation
- [Docs llms.txt](https://docs.scopy.dev/llms.txt)
